data.title: NVIDIA adds CUDA Tile backend to OpenAI Triton for Python developers to access Tensor Core performance without CUDA knowledge, utilizing Blackwell GPUs.
data.description: The introduction of NVIDIA's latest CUDA Tile IR backend for OpenAI Triton allows Python developers to utilize Tensor Core performance without needing expertise in CUDA. This backend specifically necessitates the use of Blackwell GPUs. For further details, please refer to the complete article.

data.title: Willdan (Nasdaq: WLDN) will release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026, followed by investor call at 5:30 p.m. ET.
data.description: In Anaheim, California, Willdan Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: WLDN) shared that it is set to reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 post the stock market's closure on Thursday, February 26, 2026. The investor conference call will be held at 5:30 p.m. ET / 2:30 p.m. PT following the results announcement. A live audio webcast of the quarterly investor conference call can be accessed on Willdan's website.

data.title: Sunset World Group hotels secure Distintivo H 2025 certification for high food quality in 5 locations in Cancun.
data.description: In Cancún, Mexico, on January 30, 2026, it was reported that the restaurants and bars within five hotels owned by the Sunset World Group - namely Sunset Royal, Sunset Marina, Sunset Fishermen, Ocean Spa, and Laguna Suites - have passed the Food Hygiene Management Program assessment. The evaluation was carried out by a collaborative effort involving the hotels and an undisclosed organization.

data.title: Forte Minerals Corp. changes investor relations compensation.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that a total of 300 new cases of a certain illness have been confirmed in the country, bringing the total number of cases to 2,500. Among these cases, it has been noted that 50 individuals are currently in critical condition and receiving intensive care treatment. Additionally, health officials have confirmed that there have been 10 new fatalities, with the total death toll now standing at 150. Authorities are actively working to contain the spread of the illness through various measures and are urging the public to adhere to precautionary guidelines. With the situation evolving rapidly, further updates are expected in the coming days.

data.title: Tevogen's Board considers special cash dividend based on revenue and earnings milestones.
data.description: Tevogen's Board of Directors will assess the possibility of a special cash dividend to be issued once, subject to meeting specified future revenue and earnings goals, as well as obtaining approval from the Board.

data.title: Winter storms continue posing CO risks; CPSC warns of dangers during power outages. Protect against the invisible killer.
data.description: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) is advising consumers to safeguard against carbon monoxide (CO) as snow and ice storms persist across the nation, with a growing number of reported cases. Power outages during these storms frequently result in CO exposure, a silent threat that has caused a significant uptick in incidents. The CPSC is emphasizing the importance of preventive measures to avoid CO poisoning, as increasing reports indicate a rising concern for public safety.

data.title: Entergy board declares $0.64 per share dividend, payable on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record by Feb. 9, 2026.
data.description: Entergy's board of directors in New Orleans announced a quarterly dividend of $0.64 per share for common stock shareholders today. This dividend will be paid on March 2, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 9, 2026. This decision reflects the company's ongoing commitment to rewarding its shareholders with a cash dividend.

data.title: Gold and silver prices crash, triggering mining stock meltdown; silver down 27% to $84 an ounce, gold down 9.5% to $4,861. SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) plunge 10.5%, iShares Silver Trust (SLV) collapse 28%. President Trump's Fed chair nomination Kevin Warsh seen as inflation hawk sparks selloff.
data.description: Gold and silver prices suffered historic collapses on Friday, with silver dropping 27% to $84 an ounce and gold sliding 9.5% to $4,861 by 2:00 p.m. in New York. These were the worst single-day declines since 1980 for both metals. Exchange-traded products like SPDR Gold Shares and iShares Silver Trust saw significant drops, with GLD falling 10.5% and SLV plummeting 28% - their worst sessions on record. The selloff was attributed to a repricing of monetary risk following President Donald Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve chair, who is viewed as a hawk on inflation. This news quickly dismantled the "debasement trade" that had fueled the precious metals rally in January.

data.title: Trump's pick for Fed chair, Kevin Warsh, may struggle to lower interest rates due to potential opposition.
data.description: In a recent development, Kevin M. Warsh has been selected by President Trump as the potential next chair of the Federal Reserve. However, there is speculation that he may encounter strong opposition if he aims to implement significant reductions in borrowing rates.

data.title: January 2026 marked record-breaking performances for some U.S. stocks. Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ: SNDK) surged over 150% with the best month since IPO in February 2025, now up over 1,400%. Cameco Corp. (NYSE: CCJ) also advanced 37% due to analyst upgrades and nuclear energy support. Check Benzinga.com for the full story.
data.description: In January 2026, a cluster of U.S. stocks experienced significant shifts in performance due to earnings surprises, updated guidance, and disruptions in the AI sector. Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ: SNDK) was one of the standout performers, with its stock surging over 150%, the best month since its IPO in February 2025. The company attributed this growth to exceptional quarterly earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, driven by tightening memory and storage supply conditions amid increasing demand from AI data centers. As a result, Sandisk is up over 1,400% since going public and was the top-performing S&P 500 constituent for the month. Cameco Corp. (NYSE: CCJ) also saw an increase of 37% fueled by analyst upgrades in earnings forecasts and price targets, strengthened by rising uranium prices and renewed policy support for nuclear energy. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ComEd launches Low-Income Discount program in Rockford, offering monthly electric bill discounts to income-eligible customers.
data.description: In Rockford, Illinois, ComEd recently announced the launch of the Low-Income Discount (LID) program, in partnership with community leaders. This program, in accordance with the Illinois Climate and Equitable Jobs Act, offers eligible customers with low income a percentage-based discount on their monthly electric bill. The discounts range from 3% to 6% of total household income, aiming to reduce energy costs for those who qualify.

data.title: Influential Women Podcast features Stacey Ryan, President of School of Rock, discussing leadership and gender equality.
data.description: A recent conversation delved into the topics of authentic leadership, vulnerability in corporate environments, and opportunities for women in male-dominated industries. The discussion took place in St. Petersburg, Florida, on January 30, 2026. The Influential Women Podcast, a component of the larger Influential Women media platform, spearheaded this dialogue.

data.title: Attorney Steven Lustig of Panitch Schwarze named among World Trademark Review's WTR 1000 ranking for 2026.
data.description: Philadelphia-based law firm, Panitch Schwarze Belisario & Nadel LLP, recently shared the news of attorney Steven D. Lustig earning a spot in the prestigious WTR 1000 ranking for 2026. This recognition highlights top professionals and firms in the field of trademarks. Lustig's inclusion in this list indicates his expertise and standing in the industry.

data.title: Correction: Reddy Ice, LLC, not Stone Canyon, to acquire Arctic Glacier. Clarification for news release.
data.description: In a correction issued by Reddy Ice, LLC, it was clarified that the news release regarding Reddy Ice Announcing Agreement to Acquire Arctic Glacier was incorrectly attributed to Stone Canyon Industries Holdings. The accurate source of the announcement is Reddy Ice, LLC. This acquisition deal involves important numbers and details that were outlined in the original press release.

data.title: Malaga Financial Corp. reports 2025 earnings with net income of $21.55M, a 5% decrease compared to 2024.
data.description: Malaga Financial Corporation, parent company of Malaga Bank FSB, announced a net income of $21,554,000 ($2.18 per share) for the twelve months ending December 31, 2025, down 5% from $22,651,000 ($2.29 per share) in 2024. The net income for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, was $5,123,000 ($0.52 per share), a 4% decrease from the previous year. The Company’s annualized return on average equity was 9.92% and return on average assets was 1.53% for the twelve months ending December 31, 2025, compared to 11.08% and 1.58% in 2024.
